fundamentals.long_business_summary: Black Rose Industries Limited engages in the import, development, manufacturing, export, and distribution of chemicals in India and internationally. It offers various specialty chemicals for use in various industries, including agrochemicals, polymer additives, dyestuffs, catalysts, tyres, perfumeries, and others; and performance chemicals, such as flocculants and coagulants, cyanoacrylate adhesives, polymer additives, rubber chemicals, thermoplastic elastomers, epoxy hardeners, and salt tablets to chemical producers, sugar manufacturers, tyre companies, pharmaceutical firms, and others. The company also provides acrylamide solutions under the BRILMIDE brand name; a range of organic coagulants and flocculants for the water and wastewater treatment under the BRILFLOC and BRILTREAT brands; N-Methylol Acrylamide under the BRILMER brand; and ceramic binders for ceramic industry under the BRILBIND brand name. In addition, it manufactures polyacrylamide liquids and polyacrylamide solids; and fabrics and textile made ups for industrial applications. Further, the company operates two windmills in Rajasthan and Gujarat. The company also exports its products and supplies dyes intermediates and electronic chemicals. It serves small and medium-sized enterprises; and various industries, such as paints and coatings, water/wastewater treatment, ceramic binders, construction chemicals, surfactants and adhesives, oil and gas, textiles, paper, leather chemicals, and other industries. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is based in Mumbai, India. Black Rose Industries Limited is a subsidiary of Wedgewood Holdings Ltd.
